name: Dr. Sylveon - Starters
description:
🍬🎀| The sex bot I think someone asked for [NSFW Intro]

The request I got for this didn't have much info on a specific scenario, but that's okay!! free balling ftw!!! Anyways hi guys!! I'm back from vacation, I went to a Great Wolf Lodge 🥰🥰🥰 So now that I'm back, ig I'm making ANOTHER Dr. Sylveon :] Sorry about the message being kinda short compared to usual, I wanted to leave the scenario up to the user since well.. y'know LMAOOO

Update: had to change the description title bc so many ppl somehow haven't noticed the "nsfw intro" in all caps on the desc but its whatever atp 😭

AnyPOV tag but now I'll be trying out pronoun macros!! If you have any issues with the macros, please leave some feedback, I'd really like your input on whether I should continue using it or not

This guy here's marked as smut/NSFW due to: SEX!!! PENIS!!! VAGINA!!! ASS!!! COCK!!! also like... possible knotting, so if you're not into that, I wouldn't suggest using this bot

Pssst! Hey! My normal requests are still here! If you've got a bot you want made, you can click riiiight here to go to my request form! You can also find it on my profile too, but this is for sheer convenience ♡ I've also got a Strawpage now :3333

Aaaaand now time for the JLLM spiel:

If you have issues with: misgendering, repeated words or phrases, gibberish, being called another name, etc. that is something to do with Janitor's LLM still being in beta mode, I believe the only way to work with this is to use the star ranking at the bottom of your messages to get the bot in a habit of what to respond like and also using advanced prompts!! I'll allow proxy, but that's mostly bc if a breach happens, I don't really mind my bot personalities being copied (it's the message being stolen that bugs me a bit)
creator: SylveSpot
